title: Anonymous Daily Leaderboard
summary: Add a pseudo-leaderboard system for daily challenges. Since there's no backend, generate consistent 'anonymous' scores using the daily seed PRNG. After completing a daily challenge, show the player how they compare (percentile, rank). Display a top-10 leaderboard on the daily challenge screen. Track daily performance history (last 7 days). Add competitive framing and opt-in display name.

tasks.description: Create DailyLeaderboard class in main.js with seeded pseudo-leaderboard generation. Using the daily challenge date seed, generate 50 fake anonymous scores (gate count + time pairs). Scores should follow a believable distribution: cluster around optimalGates+1 to optimalGates+4 with a few outlier high/low scores. Store the player's own result alongside fake scores.
acceptance_criteria: DailyLeaderboard class exists with generatePseudoScores(seed, optimalGates) method
Generates 50 consistent fake scores from the date seed
Scores follow bell-curve distribution around optimal+2
Player's real score can be inserted via submitScore(gateCount, timeSeconds)
getPercentile(gateCount) returns 0-100 based on position among fake scores
getRank(gateCount) returns 1-based rank among all scores

tasks.description: After daily challenge completion, show 'You solved in X gates — faster than Y% of players today' message. Display below the star display in the results area. Include rank badge: Top 10% = 🥇, Top 25% = 🥈, Top 50% = 🥉. Integrate with both animated RUN and Quick Test completion paths.
acceptance_criteria: Percentile message appears after daily challenge completion
Rank badge (🥇/🥈/🥉) shown based on percentile
Works for both normal RUN and Quick Test completion
Message format: 'You solved in X gates — faster than Y% of players today'
Only appears for daily challenges, not campaign or random

tasks.description: Display top 10 anonymous scores on daily challenge button or in a pre-challenge screen. Show gate count, solve time, and rank number. Highlight the player's own entry if they've already completed today's challenge.
acceptance_criteria: Top 10 leaderboard visible on daily challenge screen (before starting)
Each entry shows: rank, gate count, solve time
Player's own score highlighted if present
Today's leader score shown with competitive framing
Leaderboard updates after player completes the challenge

tasks.description: Add daily performance history tracking. Store last 7 days of daily challenge results in localStorage. Show in a mini-history section: date, gate count, rank badge, time.
acceptance_criteria: Daily results stored in localStorage with date key
Last 7 days of results retrievable
History displays: date, gates, time, percentile badge
Old entries (>7 days) automatically pruned
History visible on the daily challenge pre-screen

tasks.description: Add 'Your Daily Rank' badge on the daily challenge button on level select screen. If today's challenge is completed, show the rank badge. If not, show nothing or 'Not played'.
acceptance_criteria: Daily challenge button shows rank badge if today is completed
Badge updates after completion without page refresh
No badge shown if today's challenge not attempted

tasks.description: Show historical daily performance (last 7 days) in the stats dashboard. Add a 'Daily Challenge' section showing date, gates used, time, rank for each day played.
acceptance_criteria: Stats dashboard has 'Daily Challenge History' section
Shows last 7 days with date, gates, time, rank badge
Empty state shows 'No daily challenges played recently'

tasks.description: Rate-limit daily challenge submissions to 1 per day. If the player re-solves, update their score only if improved. Store best daily result per date.
acceptance_criteria: Only best result per day is stored
Re-solving with fewer gates updates the stored result
Re-solving with more gates does NOT overwrite
Percentile recalculates with updated score

tasks.description: Add subtle competitive framing to daily challenge. Before starting, show 'Today's leader used just X gates — can you match them?' where X is the best pseudo-score for the day.
acceptance_criteria: Competitive framing message visible before starting daily challenge
Message references today's best (pseudo) score
Message disappears once player starts the challenge

tasks.description: Include opt-in display name stored locally. Add a small input field on the daily leaderboard screen. Name appears next to the player's score in the leaderboard.
acceptance_criteria: Display name input field on daily challenge screen
Name persists in localStorage across sessions
Player's leaderboard entry shows their chosen name
Default: 'You' if no name set
Max 16 characters

tasks.description: Enhance the share result text for daily challenges to include leaderboard rank. Update the existing share button to include percentile and rank badge in the copied text.
acceptance_criteria: Share text includes rank badge and percentile
Format: '⚡ Signal Circuit Daily — Top X%! 🥈'
Includes gate count, time, and streak as before

testing_focus: Daily leaderboard generates consistent scores for same date
Player score correctly inserted among pseudo-scores
Share text formatting with rank info
UI updates correctly after daily completion
No regression on campaign levels or other challenge modes
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced, revert to previous commit
